import React, { useState } from 'react'; import AdminNavbar from '../components/AdminNavbar'; import AdminSidebar from '../components/AdminSidebar'; const ManageReturnsFixed = () => { const [returns, setReturns] = useState([ { id: 1, user: 'John BR1024', car: 'Toyota Camry', image: 'https://i.imgur.com/70MJRvL.png', bookingDate: 'January 23, 2026', returnDate: 'January 20, 2026', status: 'Completed' }, { id: 2, user: 'Nino BR1009', car: 'Honda CR-V', image: 'https://i.imgur.com/1oZxIq7.png', bookingDate: 'January 10, 2026', returnDate: 'January 12, 2026', status: 'Completed' }, { id: 3, user: 'Jastine BR1024', car: 'Toyota Wigo', image: 'https://i.imgur.com/d8xwD0J.png', bookingDate: 'January 15, 2026', returnDate: 'January 19, 2026', status: 'Failed' }, { id: 4, user: 'Mark BR1035', car: 'Ford Ranger', image: 'https://i.imgur.com/cbvmOmk.png', bookingDate: 'February 1, 2026', returnDate: 'February 5, 2026', status: 'Completed' }, { id: 5, user: 'Anna BR1040', car: 'Nissan Altima', image: 'https://i.imgur.com/TrnYMBx.png', bookingDate: 'February 10, 2026', returnDate: 'February 15, 2026', status: 'Pending' }, { id: 6, user: 'Ken BR1045', car: 'Jeep Wrangler', image: 'https://i.imgur.com/AomOZxx.png', bookingDate: 'February 20, 2026', returnDate: 'February 25, 2026', status: 'Completed' }, ]); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState(''); const filteredReturns = returns.filter(ret => { const matchesSearch = ret.user.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || ret.car.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); const matchesStatus = !statusFilter || ret.status.toLowerCase() === statusFilter.toLowerCase(); return matchesSearch && matchesStatus; }); const handleStatusChange = (id, newStatus) => { setReturns(returns.map(r => { if (r.id === id) { return { ...r, status: newStatus }; } return r; })); }; const handleDeleteReturn = (id) => { setReturns(returns.filter(r => r.id !== id)); }; const totalReturns = returns.length; return (
